overall.description: First-person exploration of a high-fidelity game engine recreation of an ancient classical temple or palace. The player approaches the columned entrance, passes armored guards, and explores ornate interior spaces with red walls, marble floors, and statues, before exiting to an outdoor courtyard and temple complex.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the grand entrance of a classical stone temple with tall fluted columns. Two armored guards stand at attention on either side of the large wooden doorway as the camera moves forward to enter the building.

segments.scene_description: Passing through the entrance, the scene transitions into a long corridor with deep red walls accented with gold trim. The marble floor features intricate geometric patterns, and a classical statue stands at the far end of the hallway.

segments.scene_description: Entering a grand ceremonial hall, the camera reveals large marble warrior statues standing on pedestals against ornate wooden screens. A prominent lion pelt rug lies in the center of the room, and red banners hang from the ceiling.

segments.scene_description: Moving through narrow interior corridors, the camera passes wall paintings in gilded frames and decorative stone urns. The red painted walls continue throughout these passageways, with occasional stone benches placed along the sides.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building through a side door, the scene opens into a stone courtyard with tall walls covered in climbing vegetation. Large planters with cypress trees line the path as the camera approaches a tall metal gate leading outward.

segments.scene_description: Passing through the gate into the open temple complex, the camera reveals a large classical temple with white columns and red accents. Tall freestanding columns and mature olive trees dot the cobblestone grounds under bright sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the imposing entrance of a classical temple through its ornate interior and out into a sun-drenched courtyard complex. It begins by approaching tall fluted columns and passing armored guards at a large wooden doorway, moving seamlessly into a long corridor defined by deep red walls, gold trim, and patterned marble floors. The scene then expands into a grand ceremonial hall featuring warrior statues and red banners before narrowing again into corridors lined with gilded wall paintings and decorative stone urns. As the camera exits through a side door, the interior red tones give way to a stone courtyard with climbing vegetation and cypress trees. Finally, the view opens through a metal gate into a bright, open complex of white columns, cobblestone grounds, and mature olive trees under a clear sky.
